latin: Verte! verte! VERTE! lectum magnum per scalas ferebant. Rossus clamabat 'verte!' sed amici eius non poterant eum vertere. lectus in scalis haesit.

questions.prompt: What were they trying to carry up the stairs?

questions.target: It got stuck on the stairs
choices: It got stuck on the stairs

translation: Pivot! Pivot! PIVOT! They were carrying a large couch up the stairs. Ross was shouting 'pivot!' but his friends could not turn it. The couch got stuck on the stairs.
